hooks.prompt: If a vault is configured for this session (check AGENTS.md for VAULT_PATH or a wiki/ folder in the current directory), silently read wiki/hot.md to restore recent context. If wiki/hot.md does not exist, do nothing. This is a non-vault session. Do not announce this. Do not report what you read. Just have the context available.

hooks.command: cd "$PWD" && [ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && { echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely. It is a cache, not a journal.'; [ -d services ] && echo 'ADLC_HINT: This vault has services/ (ADLC). If code repos changed too, run the wrap-up sync to inject updates into their code wikis and reflect shipped features / gaps / requirements here before ending.'; } || true
